name: Stuffed Chili Rellenos
recipeIngredient: Cooked crab (6 oz) or diced shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the chilies and plan about 4 per person.
2. Open each chili flat.
3. In a well-buttered glass oven dish, place a layer of chilies at the bottom.
4. Dust the jack cheese with a small amount of flour.
5. Mix together the crab and/or shrimp with the Jack cheese.
6. Place a thin layer of this mix over the bottom layer of chilies.
7. Place another layer of chilies on top and repeat until finished with a top layer of chilies.
8. Bake in a 375°F oven for 7-10 minutes, uncovered.
9. Reduce heat to 300°F and prepare batter by mixing together (doubling if necessary) Bisquick and milk. Pour over the chilies.
10. Add grated cheddar cheese and bake, covered, until done. The dish is ready when a knife inserted in the middle comes out relatively clean. If it does not set completely after 30 minutes, serve with salad and corn.
